# Parity — ablation experiment

**Goal**: study which model knobs matter for permutation parity.

Vary one knob at a time over the toy dataset (`n=5`):

| Knob | Choices |
|------|---------|
| `--model_size` | `small`, `medium`, `large` |

## How to run
```bash
cd parity/experiments/ablation/scripts
# Reuses the dataset generated by the toy experiment
python train.py --model_size small
python train.py --model_size large
```

Outputs land in `outputs/results_<model_size>/` so successive runs do not overwrite.
